programme.title: River Monsters - Return of the Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Could the original River Monster be back from the brink and back in business?

programme.title: River Monsters - Body Snatcher
programme.desc: Jeremy is convinced a river monster is at large after hearing tales of a body-snatching.

programme.title: River Monsters - Atomic Assassin
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade braves the radiation in Chernobyl on the trail of a monster fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Jungle Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to the jungles of South America to track down a dangerous fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mongolian Mauler
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy Wade investigates a rare giant fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Freshwater Shark

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to Australia's Fitzroy River on his toughest quest yet.

programme.title: River Monsters - American Killer Catfish

programme.title: River Monsters - Coral Reef Killer

programme.title: River Monsters - Vampires of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: River Monsters - Death Ray
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to Thailand in search of the 700lb giant freshwater stingray.

programme.title: River Monsters - Hidden Predator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to South Africa, where the biggest bull shark ever recorded was caught.

programme.title: River Monsters - Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic Pacific island, an ancient fishing community is being terrorised.

programme.title: River Monsters - Bone Crusher

programme.title: River Monsters - Secrets of the Sea
programme.desc: Jeremy goes behind the scenes and we see what went into the making of a season at sea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mekong Mutilator

programme.title: River Monsters - Flesh Ripper

programme.title: River Monsters - Legend of Loch Ness

programme.title: The Korean Dish Expedition - The Korean Dish Expedition Ep.12
programme.desc: The heirloom cuisine of Korea’s traditional clan families carries generations of wisdom rooted in harmony with nature. Some flavors have faded, others nearly forgotten?but at the refined yet simple tables set by the family matriarchs, viewers experience a moving journey back in time.

programme.title: Cheers Brother - Cheers Brother Episode 5
programme.desc: Together with actress Lee El, the group explores traditional liquors from Andong, Gyeongsangbuk-do. programme.title: Mozambique
programme.desc: An out-of-work and penniless American pilot is offered work in Mozambique and promptly becomes an unwitting pawn in a world of drug smuggling, kidnap and murder.

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: The Grasshopper
programme.desc: Christine Adams leaves her small town in British Columbia at age 19 to follow her boyfriend to L.A., where he works for a bank. She soon gets bored and moves to Las Vegas and becomes a showgirl, eventually slipping into prostitution.

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: The Worm Eaters
programme.desc: A German hermit, who can talk with worms, seeks revenge on the town's mayor by putting mutant worms in everyone's meals and turning them into human worm slaves.

programme.desc: Two brothers try to fulfill the promise they made to their dying father.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep8 - EP108

They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Tolerance - EP114
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that tolerance is about living in harmony, accepting, and respecting the tastes of other people, as well as helping those who need it without expecting to receive something in return. We are all different and that makes the world so special, that's why you have to be supportive and show solidarity for others.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kplass Cough and Flu Relief Patch

Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Kampo CholesGuard
programme.desc: A premium, natural supplement trusted globally for over 20 years. It helps to manage cholesterol to a healthy level by combining Red Yeast Rice (Monacolin K) with high-activity Nattokinase. Enhanced with Dan Shen and Wild Yam, it helps to support vessel elasticity and reduces heart workload. It is toxin-free and safe for long-term daily use. You could claim a full refund if you do not see results in 30 days. 一款享誉全球20余年的优质天然保健品。它结合了红曲（莫纳可林K）和高活性纳豆激酶，有助于将胆固醇维持在健康水平。添加丹参和野生山药，有助于增强血管弹性，减轻心脏负担。本产品不含毒素，可长期服用，安全可靠。提供30天安心保证，如30天后未见效，全额退款。

programme.title: The Worm Eaters
programme.desc: A German hermit, who can talk with worms, seeks revenge on the town's mayor by putting mutant worms in everyone's meals and turning them into human worm slaves.

programme.title: Trinity Is Still My Name

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Behaving on the Street and Minding Traffic Signs - EP104
programme.desc: Nova will invite children to a new expedition to become super pedestrians. Together, they will discover how they should behave in public spaces or streets. Curious will teach us the correct way to cross the street, know the traffic lights and traffic signals. They will also learn that the car is a very fun place that has rules to follow to enjoy and stay safe.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Justice - EP115
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that justice is when we are all treated equally, regardless of our differences, and we must give and receive the same attention to other people. Respect is shown by good treatment, complying with the laws to live in peace! We will also understand freedom and how to use it intelligently.

programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover the value and importance of communication. We will learn the correct ways to communicate and the main rules of the good listener.
